overall.description: First-person gameplay footage walking through a stormy mountain pass at night. Heavy rain falls on a stone path winding through rocky cliffs and dead trees, with ancient stone ruins becoming visible in the final moments.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow mountain pass between steep rocky cliffs

events.description: lightning flash illuminates the storm clouds overhead

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the stone path through the narrow mountain pass in heavy rain

entered.detail: steep gray rock face forming the right wall of the mountain pass
wet cobblestone trail winding through the mountains
narrow gap between mountain peaks visible in the distance
dark turbulent clouds covering the sky with occasional lightning

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a first-person view walking through a narrow mountain pass during a heavy storm. The path is flanked by steep rocky cliffs on the right and scattered boulders on the left. Rain falls steadily as lightning occasionally illuminates the dark clouds overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain trail with scattered dead trees

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path as the rocky cliffs recede and dead trees become prominent in the distance

entered.detail: leafless gnarled trees with bare branches silhouetted against the storm sky

segments.scene_description: As the camera moves forward, the steep cliff wall falls behind and the path opens slightly to reveal dead trees ahead. The cobblestone trail continues through the storm, with the gnarled silhouettes of leafless trees becoming the focal point against the dark sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: approach to ancient stone ruins in mountain valley

events.description: camera tilts upward to show the stormy sky and dead tree canopy overhead
ancient stone ruins become visible on the right side of the path

agents.ego_description: approaching stone ruins while looking up at the storm overhead, then returning gaze to the path

entered.detail: weathered stone structures and walls partially covered in moss on the hillside

segments.scene_description: The camera tilts up to reveal the stormy sky through the canopy of dead trees, then tilts back down as ancient stone ruins come into view on the right. The path continues toward these weathered structures while the storm intensifies, with heavy rain falling on the cobblestones.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a narrow, storm-lashed mountain pass that gradually opens into a desolate landscape of dead trees. It begins by navigating a tight corridor flanked by steep rocky cliffs and scattered boulders under a dark, rain-soaked sky. As the camera moves forward, the oppressive cliff wall recedes, allowing the path to widen and the environment to expand. The scene then shifts its focus toward the horizon, where the gnarled silhouettes of leafless trees emerge against the clouds, illuminated by occasional flashes of lightning. Finally, the cobblestone trail leads deeper into the storm, transitioning from the enclosure of the cliffs to the stark openness of the skeletal forest.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a stormy mountain pass that culminates in the discovery of ancient ruins. It begins with the camera tilting upward to reveal a turbulent, stormy sky glimpsed through a canopy of dead trees. As the view tilts back down, the perspective shifts toward the right where weathered stone ruins emerge from the gloom. The camera then advances along the cobblestone path toward these structures while the storm intensifies, with heavy rain increasingly blurring the surroundings.
